entries.definition:
h–d–d to pull down, to demolish; thud, thundering sound,
devastating event; to frighten, to threaten. Of this root, هَدّ hadd
occurs once in the Qur’an.

هَدّ hadd [v. n.] crashing, crumbling to pieces (19:90) وَتَشَقُّ

981
